description_long: This object consists of a pair of hexagonal dumbbells with black rubber-coated end caps and a metallic handle. The end caps are large, flat-faced hexagons, which prevent the dumbbells from rolling and provide stability when placed on the ground. The handles are cylindrical, metallic, and feature a knurled texture for improved grip and ergonomics. The rubber coating on the end caps is matte and slightly textured, while the metal handles have a shiny, smooth finish. Weight markings are visible on the end caps, embossed into the rubber surface. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A pair of black hexagonal dumbbells with rubber-coated ends and metallic knurled handles, featuring embossed weight markings. The dumbbells appear new and well-maintained.
description_view_0: Two hexagonal dumbbells are shown with their flat, black rubber-coated end caps and metallic handles clearly visible, weight markings are readable on the end faces.
description_view_1: The dumbbells are viewed from a slightly higher angle, emphasizing the hexagonal shape of the end caps and the alignment of the handles.
description_view_2: A top-down view highlights the symmetry of the dumbbells, with the hexagonal end caps and metallic handles forming a cross-like arrangement.
description_view_3: This view shows the dumbbells from a rear angle, focusing on the back faces of the end caps and the length of the handles.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical steel handle with a round cross-section and knurled texture for grip.
attribute_end_cap_design: Hexagonal, flat-faced end caps made of black rubber with slightly textured surfaces and embossed markings.
attribute_presence_of_weight_markings: Weight markings are visible, embossed on the flat faces of the end caps, showing the value '10'.
attribute_condition: The dumbbells appear new and unused, with no visible signs of wear, rust, or damage.
